info.description:
REST API for Simponi - multi-store inventory and omnichannel management system.
This API supports store management, product management, external product integration, vendor management, and role-based access control (RBAC).
info.title: Simponi Backend API

post.description: Generate new access token using valid refresh token (no Bearer token required)
Authenticate user using email and password to obtain access token and refresh token
Stop impersonation and return to original admin user
Admin impersonates another user and receives a new access token

get.description:
Get all permissions or paginated permissions (Requires permission: GetPermissions)
Set query param `pagination=false` to disable pagination

post.description: Create a new role with permissions (Requires permission: CreateRole)

get.description: Get role detail with permissions (Requires permission: GetRoleByRoleID)

put.description: Update role and its permissions (Requires permission: UpdateRoleByRoleID)

delete.description: Delete role by ID (Requires permission: DeleteRoleByRoleID)

post.description: Create a new store and assign platform (Requires permission: CreateStore)

get.description: Get store detail with platforms (Requires permission: GetStoreByStoreID)

delete.description: Delete store by ID (Requires permission: DeleteStoreByStoreID)

get.description: Get list of external products by store

post.description: Create a new external product for a store

get.description: Get external products filtered by store platform
Get detail of external product by ID
Get paginated products in a store (Requires permission: GetProducts)

post.description: Create a new product inside a store (Requires permission: CreateProduct)

get.description: Get aggregated product statistics in a store (Requires permission: GetProductStats)
Get product detail by store ID and product ID (Requires permission: GetProductByStoreIDAndProductID)

delete.description: Delete product by ID (Requires permission: DeleteProductByStoreIDAndProductID)

patch.description: Update product stock with source tracking (Requires permission: UpdateStockByStoreIDAndProductID)

get.description: Get paginated users assigned to a store (Requires permission: GetStoreUsers)

post.description: Assign multiple users to a store (Requires permission: CreateStoreUsers)

get.description: Get detail of a specific user within a store (Requires permission: GetStoreUserByStoreIDAndUserID)
get.summary: Get specific user in a store

delete.description: Remove a user from a store (Requires permission: DeleteStoreUserByStoreIDAndUserID)

post.description: Upload single or multiple images using multipart/form-data (key: files)
Create a new user (Requires permission: CreateUser)

get.description: Get authenticated user profile (Requires permission: GetUserProfile)
Get user detail by user ID (Requires permission: GetUserByUserID)

put.description: Update user data by ID (Requires permission: UpdateUserByUserID)

delete.description: Delete user by ID (Requires permission: DeleteUserByUserID)

BearerAuth.description: Use JWT token with format: Bearer <your_token>
BearerAuth.name: Authorization

tags.description: Authentication (signin, refresh token) and token management
tags.name: Auth

tags.description: Manage users within a store (membership & access)
tags.name: Store Users

tags.description: Inventory movement and stock change logs
tags.name: Inventory Logs

tags.description: Admin impersonation for debugging and support
tags.name: Impersonate
